headline: The Goldman Sachs Group, Inc. reported its financial results for the first quarter ended March 31, 2026.
investor_impact: The Q1 2026 earnings release and accompanying management conference call will provide critical updates on the firm's financial performance, capital position, and forward-looking guidance. This information is essential for analysts to update valuation models and assess the bank's operational momentum.
key_figures: April 13, 2026 (Earnings release and conference call date)
Denis P. Coleman III (Chief Financial Officer)
